title: Why AI adoption stalls: a field diagnosis
description: Most AI adoption failures aren't technical. They're organisational. Here's what I've observed over two years working at the intersection of AI strategy and change management.

title: The CIR as a mirror: what R&D tax credits reveal about how firms think about innovation
description: The questions companies struggle to answer for the CIR are the same ones they struggle to answer internally.

title: The People Problem in GenAI Adoption
description: GenAI adoption stalls not because people fear the technology, but because organisations keep solving the wrong problem — and each failed rollout consumes trust that won't replenish itself.
